title: Prism Animation Block
description: Client-side tween configuration. Honoured only by the browser web component and the WASM runtime; static SVG and PDF renderers ignore this block.

duration_ms.description: Total tween duration in milliseconds. Default 400.

stagger_ms.description: Per-mark offset applied in document order. Default 0.

enter.description: Enter transition for marks that appear. Default fade.

exit.description: Exit transition for marks that disappear. Default fade.
